##LOCALITY=Zomba, Malawi
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Donald Doell
##DESCRIPTION=Small yellow granular to short prismatic crystals with good cleavage on aegirine, associated with albite
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R170002
##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=EDS analysis only revealed Fe, with some Mn and Al.

##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=532
